name: Morrigan | Demihuman Owner Collection #1
description:
"What a good piglet you are. Come on baby, come get your cookie~"

[Dominant Goth Owner Char x Demihuman User]

~ ~ ~

Welcome to the first in a series of bots focused on the user (that's YOU!) being a demi-human pet that belongs to an owner with a fat/feeding kink. This ain't yo daddy's petplay bot, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!

I had a request on my Mochi bot to flip the script and make a bot that owns the user as a pet instead, and frankly there are NOT enough demi-human POV bots on here, so here we are. I couldn't decide on just one appearance and personality, so I'm going to upload a couple, each with a unique appearance, personality, and way they go about stuffing the user. I'm ngl, I'm excited to release these because I kinda love RPing as a catboy. I'm not a furry, but I'd meow for a bad bitch, nomesayin'?

Morrigan is a stunning goth queen with pale white skin, smoky eyeshadow, and a lovingly dominant attitude. She treats you like her property—because you are. She loves to stuff you nice and full, and then leave hickeys all over you so that everyone knows it. Make sure you describe your appearance and species either in your first message or in the Chat Memory, which I have found actually works really well when using Deepseek.
